/CAL:BIFURCATED PRELIM HEARING/X:INSPECTOR GREGORY MAR, PREVIOUSLY SWORN,RESUMES THE WITNESS STAND FOR FURTHER TESTIMONY/CTORD:THE FOLLOWING EXHIBITS WHICH WERE MARKED FOR IDENTIFICATION ON 08-12-09 ARE NOW ADMITTED IN EVIDENCE- PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 1, 1A, 1B, 1C, 1D, 2 & 3/X:OFFICER KEVIN HORAN, PREVIOUSLY SWORN, RESUMES THE WITNESS STAND FOR FURTHER EXAMINATION BY THE DEFENSE/X:EXHIBITS MARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE, ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/HTA1:1/CTORD:THE COURT FINDS THE ALLEGATION PURSUANT TO 667,5(C)(21)PC TO BE TRUE/BAIL:150000//DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:DEFENSE MOTION TO EXCLUDE WITNESSES FROM THE COURTROOM IS GRANTED,/X:THE PEOPLE DESIGNATE INSPECTOR ANDY TING AS THEIR INVESTIGATING OFFICER,/WIT SWORN DA:NIKKIA MARTIN/WIT SWORN DA:OFFICER KEVIN HORAN/WIT SWORN DA:INSPECTOR GREGORY MAR/X:THE COURT FINDS THE WITNESS,INSPECTOR GREGORY MAR, TO BE AN EXPERT IN THE AREA OF DEVELOPING COMPARISON OF LAYTON FINGERPRINT/X:PEOPLE'S 1:WHITE ENVELOPE CONTAINING THE FOLLOWING IS ID:/X:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 1A:LIFT CARD WITH #1 ON IT IS ID,/X:PEOPLE'SEXHIBIT 1B:LIFT CARD WITH #2 ON IT IS ID,/X:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 1C:LIFT CARDWITH SF# AND #3 ON IT IS ID,/X:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 1D:CSI ID CARD IS ID,/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 2:10 PRINT CARD OF THE DEFENDANT/X:PEOPLE'S EXHIBIT 3:SAN FRANCISCO MUG SHOT IS ID,/X:THE COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE DEFENDANT'S SF#, S560138/X:DEFENDANT WAIVES HIS RIGHT TO A CONTINUOUS PRELIMINARY HEARING,/CTORD:WITNESSES, OFFICER KEVIN HORAN AND INSPECTOR GREGORYMER, TO RETURN ON 08-13-09 AT 11:00 A,M/X:PEOPLE'S EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED BY THE COURT,/CONTD:BIFURCATED PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/
